description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mizux/android:latest Docker image with two stages: build and test. Add a build:linux job in the build stage that runs `android create project --name Plop --target android-19 --package net.mizux.plop --activity MainActivity --gradle -v 2.1.3 -p .`, then `cp -r updated-gradle/* .`, and finally `./gradlew`. Add a test:linux job in the test stage that runs `echo "TEST COMING SOON..."`. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are defined.
